_meta.note: Universal Korean YouTube warmup comments — topic-agnostic, fits any video. Mix of lengths. No emoji-only entries. No references to specific topics/products/places/hobbies/demographics.
_meta.structure: Organized by age bucket (tone only, not topic). Each comment should plausibly appear on ANY video.
